module.name: src
module.purpose: Rust workspace source root for Marix crates with a flat Cargo crate layout plus prompt-template sources. Protocol signatures now use generated PlanId and StepId wrappers, prompt JSON uses flat model-facing PlanDraft step objects that Step::from_draft maps into runtime StepKind values through Plan::from_draft, and protocol Answer/PlanDraft data types rely on serde_json call sites rather than parse helper methods.

childModules.name: server
childModules.purpose: Server crate namespace for model/session/task/prompt/step/execution orchestration and server-side plan runtime storage. Step creates StepId-backed signatures from flat StepDraft values, and Plan::from_draft no longer allocates numeric step numbers.

childModules.name: client
childModules.purpose: Client crate namespace for the marix_client library, ClientSession and signature-aware ClientEvent source, and client binaries including a CLI whose oneshot mode exits on Done completion events; ClientSession creates task signatures with empty names and leaves request text in TaskEvent::Create.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared common crate namespace for config loading with default CoreConfig fallback and serializable System/Platform/Arch re-exports, external adapters including a redb embedded-database wrapper, database telemetry logging via the Logger client over redb and TCP, and structure utilities including WorkQueue::clear for session cleanup.

childModules.name: prompt
childModules.purpose: Owns prompt templates used by model-facing steps, including raw strict JSON response requirements, no-Markdown-fence output constraints, single-string tool and model input guidance, and a flat model-facing PlanDraft shape converted by the server into runtime steps.

childModules.name: protocol
childModules.purpose: Owns the marix-protocol crate definitions and namespace exports for session, task, plan, step, execution, tool, and shared signature contracts including PlanId and StepId identity wrappers.

childModules.name: host
childModules.purpose: Host crate namespace for HostSession and host-side tool execution; executor preview replies send System::new host metadata and tool previews, unknown-tool failures send ExecutionStatus failure events, the per-request ExecutionContext was renamed to ExecutionState, and per-execution updates are now seq-stamped with success reporting the expected update count.

childModules.name: tool
childModules.purpose: Top-level marix-tool crate that defines ToolProgram and native tool executables; it now depends on marix-protocol for tool preview/schema protocol types.
